origin.capability_match: cast their votes during the voting period

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be tampered with during submission or storage, altering the outcome of a proposal.

actor_risk.description: External user with the ability to cast votes.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Compromised votes can lead to incorrect governance decisions.

assumptions: There is no mechanism to ensure votes are recorded accurately and immutably.
The voting system is vulnerable to man-in-the-middle attacks.

mitigation.strategy: Implement end-to-end encryption and signature verification for votes.

description: An attacker may intercept and modify votes, skewing the results and leading to undesired outcomes for the governance process.

trace_source.matched_capability: cast their votes during the voting period
